message:
Merge PR #2738: fix: Convoys created by gt sling no longer empty

getTownBeadsDir() returns workspace root, but EnsureCustomTypes and
EnsureCustomStatuses expect a .beads directory path. Use
beads.ResolveBeadsDir() to resolve the actual .beads path before
passing to these functions. Includes comprehensive regression tests.

Fixes #2722

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2738
Author: mmlac
Co-Authored-By: Markus Lachinger <business@mmlac.com>
